hints.title: Usage Tips:
hints.tip1: More specific descriptions lead to more accurate user matches
hints.tip2: Include users' interests, behaviors, consumption habits, etc.
hints.tip3: atypica will automatically search and summarize the most suitable target user personas
hints.tip4: Results will automatically be added to the

notice.title: Subscription Notice
notice.description: Team subscription will auto-renew monthly. You can cancel anytime in your Stripe dashboard.

upgradeNotice.title: Pro Plan Upgrade
upgradeNotice.description: You are currently subscribed to the Pro plan. When you upgrade, any unused tokens from your Pro plan will be credited towards the cost of the Max plan, and your new Max plan will start immediately.
